channel.title: Sandeep Karmarkar on Rasagy Sharma | Design Leader, Data Artist, Design Educator & Sketchnoter

item.title: Uber Design Night on Pixel, Purpose, and Perspective
item.description: Sketchnotes by Rasagy from Uber Design Night, focused on how AI is reshaping design & research workflows.
